prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别约为5322名→5504名→3895名→3663名→4015名，整体呈先降后升的波动走势。2023年大幅前移至3895名后，2024年进一 步前移至3663名，但2025年回退至4015名，近两年波动幅度约350名。2025年基准位次约4015名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021–2022年均为50人，2023–202 4年缩减至48人，2025年进一步缩减至40人；2026年计划招生42人，较2025年增加2人，扩招约5%。扩招使竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔 滨工业大学（深圳）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名中哈工大本部2026年位列第12名（Top15），深圳校区共享本部学科评估与品牌声誉，属国内顶尖 工科院校层次；哈工大品牌在抖音平台热度排名第10（高热），综合热度约453万，国防七子品牌效应显著。声誉文件显示哈工大2024年曾出现投档线异常信号 （中关注），但2025–2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，整体平稳。深圳校区位于粤港澳大湾区核心城市，地域吸引力强；哈工大（本部）第五轮学科评估A-及以上 学科共17个，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、仪器科学与技术A等，工科实力顶尖。深圳校区招生专 业（工科试验班）直接对应计算机、通信、人工智能、自动化等优势学科方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自 动化均为高热推荐，人工智能为谨慎观望但关注度高。浙江省2026年高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增长约37.5%，竞争显著加剧。；哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）位于广东省深圳市，属异地校区，在浙江省无本地招生倾斜。该校在浙江招生计划占比较小（约 40–50人），跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限，但深圳城市吸引力对高分考生有额外加分效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年扩招5%的缓解效应、浙江省考生总 数暴增37.5%带来的竞争加剧、哈工大（深圳）顶尖工科层次与深圳地域吸引力，以及计算机/电子信息类专业持续高热等因素，判断2026年录取竞争较2025年略有加剧。，考虑考生规模大幅增长的主导作用，预测2026年最低录取位次约4220名，波动区间3720–4720名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（含计算机科学与技术、通信工程）
- 工科试验班（自主智能）（含人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 上述两专业大类内部各细分方向，因2026年招生仅设两个工科试验班大类，无传统意义上的中等难度专业。建议考生根据大类内专业方向的热度差异自行判断。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）在浙江省仅设两个工科试验班大类招生，均为顶尖热门方向。预测位次4220名附近，区间3720–4720名。位次在预测区间内建议以两个大类均衡填 报；位次明显优于区间下限（3720名以内）可重点冲刺；位次接近区间上限（4720名左右）需谨慎，建议搭配其他同层次院校保底。两专业大类内部均实行类内专业任选政策，报 考时无需过度纠结细分方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province were approximately 5322 → 5504 → 3895 → 3663 → 4015, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing and then increasing. After a significant advance to 3895 in 2023, it further advanced to 3663 in 2024, but retreated to 4015 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 350 places in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4015; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province was 50 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 48 in 2023–2024, and further reduced to 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 42 students, an increase of 2 students from 2025, an expansion of about 5%. The expansion slightly eases competition, but the effect is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus of HIT ranked 12th (Top 15) in 2026. The Shenzhen campus shares the main campus's discipline evaluations and brand reputation, belonging to the top tier of domestic engineering universities. The HIT brand ranks 10th in popularity on the Douyin platform (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 4.53 million, and the 'Defense Seven Sons' brand effect is significant. Reputation documents show that HIT experienced an abnormal signal in the admission score line in 2024 (medium attention), but the reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is neutral/mixed, generally stable. The Shenzhen campus is located in the core city of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with strong regional appeal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, HIT (main campus) had 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Instrument Science and Technology A, etc., with top engineering strength. The Shenzhen campus enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class) directly correspond to advantageous disciplines such as computer science, communications, artificial intelligence, and automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that computer science, electronic information/communications, and electrical engineering and automation are all highly recommended, while artificial intelligence is cautiously observed but with high attention. The total number of college entrance exam takers in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.5% from 291,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is located in Shenzhen, Guangdong Province, as a branch campus, with no local admission preference in Zhejiang. The enrollment plan in Zhejiang is relatively small (about 40–50 students), and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences, but the urban appeal of Shenzhen has an additional bonus effect for high-scoring students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation trend of historical rankings, the easing effect of a 5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 37.5% surge in the total number of examinees in Zhejiang Province, the top engineering level of HIT (Shenzhen) and the regional appeal of Shenzhen, as well as the sustained high popularity of computer/electronic information majors, it is judged that the admission competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. Taking into account the dominant role of the significant increase in the number of examinees, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 4220, with a fluctuation range of 3720–4720.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Various sub-directions within the above two major categories. Since the 2026 enrollment only includes two Engineering Experimental Class categories, there are no traditional medium-difficulty majors. It is recommended that candidates judge based on the popularity differences of the sub-directions within the categories.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) only offers two Engineering Experimental Class categories for enrollment in Zhejiang Province, both of which are top popular directions. The predicted ranking is around 4220, with a range of 3720–4720. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to apply to both categories in a balanced manner; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3720) can focus on sprinting; those with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 4720) should be cautious and consider pairing with other institutions of the same level as a safety option. Both major categories implement a policy of free choice of majors within the category, so candidates do not need to overly worry about sub-directions when applying.
